hero.title: Luna Legal Lab
hero.subtitle: Specialists in cybercrime and technology law
hero.description: Law firm in Palma de Mallorca specialized in criminal law, cybercrime and artificial intelligence.

focus.title: Focus
items: Criminal defense with a real understanding of the digital environment.
Advisory on technology, data and artificial intelligence.

about.title: A firm designed for today's legal challenges.
about.description: Luna Legal Lab is born as the evolution of traditional law towards a model adapted to current technological challenges.
paragraphs: The firm combines the precision of criminal law with a specialized perspective on digital environments, electronic evidence and emerging regulatory risks.
The approach is simple: clear, strategic and contemporary legal advice for individuals, professionals and organizations facing legal issues linked to technology.

values.title: Criminal law rigor
values.text: Strong legal analysis for complex matters, focused on procedure, strategy and client protection.

values.title: Technological perspective
values.text: Real understanding of the digital context to address electronic evidence, platforms, data and artificial intelligence.

values.title: Clear communication
values.text: Direct explanations, informed decisions and close support throughout the entire process.

practiceAreas.title: Criminal and technological matters handled with depth.
practiceAreas.description: A practice focused on areas where law and technology intersect directly.

items.title: Cybercrime
items.text: Legal assistance in online fraud, unauthorized access, identity theft, digital harassment and disputes involving electronic evidence.

items.title: Criminal Law
items.text: Defense and procedural strategy with a rigorous approach, aimed at protecting rights, reputation and legal certainty.

items.title: Technology Law
items.text: Advisory on digital risks, compliance, technology contracts and liability in connected environments.

items.title: Artificial Intelligence
items.text: Guidance on business use of AI, governance, risk prevention and legal integration of new automated systems.

method.title: A composed approach for cases that demand precision.
method.description: Each matter is approached with criminal law criteria, digital understanding and a clear roadmap from the very beginning.

steps.title: Analysis
steps.text: Assessment of the case, technological context, available documentation and potential legal scenarios.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.text: Definition of the course of action, procedural priorities and defense or advisory plan.

steps.title: Execution
steps.text: Rigorous implementation with close follow-up, clear communication and attention to every stage of the process.
